help.advanced.adaptiveAi.content: The Adaptive AI engine detects your hardware at runtime — WebGPU, WebNN, DirectML, CPU cores, VRAM tier, and battery — and routes local inference to the fastest available backend. Enable it under 设置 → Early Access Features and inspect the live readout under 设置 → AI. Eco Mode picks the smallest viable model to save battery and memory, and a tab-leader election ensures only one browser tab uses the GPU at a time to avoid VRAM collisions.
help.advanced.adaptiveAi.title: 自适应 AI、GPU 和 Eco 模式
help.advanced.cloudSync.content: Optional end-to-end encrypted sync keeps your library in step across devices using a Cloudflare R2 backend. Enable “Cloud sync” under 设置 → Early Access Features and configure it under 设置 → Connections. Project data is encrypted locally with AES-256-GCM before upload, and your AI API keys are never sent to the cloud. Sync is entirely opt-in; with it off, StoryCraft remains a fully offline-first app.
help.advanced.cloudSync.title: 云同步
help.advanced.encryption.content: Protect every manuscript, snapshot, and setting stored on your device with AES-256-GCM encryption derived from a passphrase (PBKDF2, 600,000 iterations). Enable it under 设置 → Privacy & Security → “Encrypt project data at rest”. On the next launch an unlock dialog asks for your passphrase; you can change or disable it later from the same panel. Your passphrase never leaves the device and cannot be recovered — export an encrypted library backup before you experiment.
help.advanced.encryption.title: 静态加密
help.advanced.languages.content: StoryCraft Studio ships in seven interface languages — German, English, French, Spanish, Italian, plus Arabic and Hebrew as a right-to-left (RTL) Beta. Switch language in 设置 → General, the 欢迎 Portal, or the Command Palette. Selecting Arabic or Hebrew flips the whole interface to RTL and loads self-hosted Noto Sans Arabic/Hebrew fonts (with Noto Naskh Arabic for the manuscript editor) for crisp glyphs. Your manuscript text always follows its own script direction, so you can mix Latin and RTL passages freely. RTL translations are a community-improvable Beta; help articles currently stay in English.
help.advanced.languages.title: 语言和从右到左 (RTL)
help.advanced.lora.content: LoRA adapters let a local model learn your personal writing voice without sending a single word to the cloud. Enable “LoRA adapter inference” under 设置 → Early Access Features, then open 设置 → AI → Fine-Tuning to load a pre-trained .safetensors adapter for a compatible WebLLM or Ollama base model. The dedicated LoRA view walks you through dataset extraction, training presets (Writer Style Light → Full Style Clone), and a side-by-side style evaluation. Training runs entirely on your device via a Python sidecar; the adapter influence is tunable with the scale (α) control.
help.advanced.lora.title: LoRA风格微调
help.advanced.plugins.content: Extend the editor with sandboxed plugins that can only touch the capabilities they declare. Enable “Plugin system” under 设置 → Early Access Features, then manage installed plugins under 设置 → Plugins. Each plugin runs behind a permission-gated API with no direct access to the Redux store, network, or file system beyond what it requests. Reference plugins — a word-count overlay and a scene appender — show the descriptor format.
help.advanced.plugins.title: 插件
help.advanced.proforge.content: ProForge is an eight-stage agentic editor that reads your whole manuscript and walks you from structural notes down to copy-edit and proofing. Enable it under 设置 → Early Access Features, then launch it from the AI tools panel in the Writer view. Every stage pauses for your review — the manuscript is never modified without explicit approval, and every change is reversible. A heuristic Supervisor flags low-confidence or fallback results so you can retry a stage with a sharper prompt.
help.advanced.proforge.title: ProForge 编辑管道
help.advanced.voice.content: Drive StoryCraft Studio hands-free: dictate prose, run commands, and hear AI responses read aloud. Turn on “Voice commands & dictation” under 设置 → Early Access Features, then configure activation (manual button, push-to-talk, or a wake word) under 设置 → Voice & Speech. The default engine uses your browser’s built-in speech with zero downloads; an optional offline Whisper.cpp WASM engine keeps audio fully on-device. All processing stays local unless you explicitly enable a cloud fallback.
help.advanced.voice.title: 语音控制和听写
help.aiStudio.critic.content:
AI Critic

Critic 工具读取选定的手稿段落，并返回三个维度的结构化反馈：节奏、清晰度和语气。它不是语法检查器 - 它评估叙事技巧。

  • 如何使用：在 AI 写作工作室中，选择评论选项卡。在编辑器中突出显示一个或多个手稿段落，然后单击分析。草稿本显示一份评级报告，每个维度都有一个可行的建议。
  • 节奏：标记感觉太仓促（短句、快速场景切换）或太慢（低冲突的长说明性块）的部分。
  • 清晰度：突出显示模棱两可的代词引用、过度嵌套的从句或与周围散文不匹配的词汇风格。
  • 语气：检测语气漂移 - 例如嵌入在高压场景中的喜剧旁白 - 并表明它是有意还是无意。
  • RAG 上下文：当启用 RAG 上下文时，评论家会收到额外的手稿块，以便它可以将所选段落与故事的其余部分进行比较，发现单段落分析可能遗漏的一致性问题。
  • 提供者：使用与作者相同的提供者、模型和创意设置。切换到更高质量的模型以获得更细致的反馈。
help.aiStudio.critic.title: 人工智能评论家
help.aiStudio.localAi.content:
Local AI — WebLLM, ONNX, Transformers.js

Run AI models entirely in your browser — no API key, no internet, no data leaves your device. Enable under 设置 → AI → Local AI.

  • WebLLM (GPU): Uses WebGPU to run quantised LLMs (Llama 3.2, Phi-3.5 Mini, Gemma 2). Fast on modern GPUs; requires ~2–6 GB VRAM. Best choice for generation quality.
  • ONNX Runtime (CPU): WASM-based inference, no GPU required. Slower but works on any device. Good for short completions and classification.
  • Transformers.js: Powers the local embedding model used by the hybrid RAG index. Runs automatically; no manual configuration needed.
  • Download a model: Go to 设置 → Advanced AI → Local AI models, pick a model, and click Download. A progress bar tracks the download; large models (2–4 GB) may take several minutes on first load.
  • Switch to local: In the AI Writing Studio toolbar, change the provider to "WebLLM" or "ONNX" before generating. Inference then runs fully offline.
help.aiStudio.localAi.title: 本地人工智能（WebLLM / ONNX）
help.aiStudio.overview.content:
Your Creative Co-Pilot

The AI Writing Studio is your dedicated space for AI-assisted writing. The workflow is designed for power and flexibility:

  1. Select Context: First, choose the manuscript section you want to work on from the dropdown menu in the '手稿 Context' panel.
  2. Choose a Tool: Select one of the powerful AI tools from the top of the 'AI Tools' panel.
  3. Provide Input: Depending on the tool, you might need to select text in the editor, choose characters, or write a prompt.
  4. 生成: Click the '生成' button. The output will appear in the 'AI Scratchpad' on the right.
  5. Review and Accept: You can edit the generated text in the scratchpad. Once you're happy, use the 'Insert' or 'Replace' buttons to apply it to your manuscript.
help.aiStudio.overview.title: AI写作工作室概述
help.aiStudio.plotAi.content:
情节板 AI: Suggest 下一步 Beat

The Suggest next beat feature uses your manuscript and outline as context to propose the next scene card for the 情节板. It is designed for moments when you know a chapter needs "something" but are unsure what.

  • Trigger: Open the 情节板 (enable 情节板 v2 in feature flags first). Click the AI ✦ button in the 情节板 toolbar to open the suggestion panel.
  • How it works: StoryCraft assembles a RAG-enriched prompt from your recent manuscript sections, existing beat cards, and your project outline. This context is sent to your configured AI provider.
  • Output: The AI returns a suggested beat title, a short description, and a recommended act placement. A preview card appears in the panel with Accept and Reject buttons.
  • Accept: Clicking Accept creates the beat card on the board in the suggested act column. You can drag it to reposition or edit the title inline.
  • Multiple suggestions: Click Suggest again to get an alternative without accepting the first. Both suggestions appear side-by-side for comparison.
  • Best results: Works best when your manuscript has at least 500 words and existing beat cards have descriptive titles. Enable RAG context in 设置 → Advanced AI for richer retrieval.
help.aiStudio.plotAi.title: 情节板 AI beats
help.aiStudio.providers.content:
AI Providers & API Keys

StoryCraft Studio connects to eight AI backends. Configure them under 设置 → AI Models and 设置 → Advanced AI. All API keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM (PBKDF2 600 000 iterations, SHA-256) before being stored in IndexedDB — they are never transmitted to any StoryCraft server.

Cloud Providers

  • Google Gemini (default): Fast, generous free tier. Get a free API key from Google AI Studio. Recommended models: gemini-2.5-flash for everyday use, gemini-2.5-pro for complex generation tasks.
  • OpenAI: GPT-4o and GPT-4o-mini. Enter your OpenAI API key in 设置 → AI → OpenAI key. Strong at instruction-following and prose rewriting.
  • Anthropic (Claude): Claude 3.5 Sonnet and Claude 3 Haiku. Enter your API key from console.anthropic.com. Excellent for long-form narrative and nuanced tone.
  • Grok (xAI): Grok-2 via xAI API. Enter your key from the xAI developer portal. Competitive on creative tasks with a lower cost per token than GPT-4.

Local / Self-Hosted Providers

  • Ollama (local — desktop only): Runs models on your machine via http://localhost:11434. Install Ollama and run ollama pull llama3.2 to get started. The Tauri desktop app bypasses the browser's CSP restriction on localhost connections. Supports any Ollama-compatible model including fine-tuned LoRA adapters.
  • WebLLM (browser, GPU): Runs quantized LLMs in the browser via WebGPU — no API key, no internet required after first download. Supported models: Llama 3.2 1B/3B, Phi-3.5 Mini, Gemma 2 2B. Requires a WebGPU-capable GPU (~2–6 GB VRAM). Download a model under 设置 → Advanced AI → Local AI models.
  • ONNX Runtime Web (browser, CPU): WASM-based inference without a GPU. Slower than WebLLM but works on any device. Good for short completions and classification tasks.
  • Transformers.js (automatic): Powers the local embedding model used by the hybrid RAG index (MiniLM-L6-v2, 384 dimensions). Runs automatically — no configuration needed.

Hybrid Fallback Chain

Under 设置 → Advanced AI → Hybrid fallback chain, define an ordered list of providers. If the primary provider returns a rate-limit or network error, StoryCraft automatically retries with the next provider in the chain. This creates a resilient setup — for example: try Gemini first, fall back to OpenAI, fall back to Ollama on desktop.

Creativity Setting

The Creativity slider (0–1) maps to the AI temperature parameter. Use 0.2–0.4 for factual tasks (summaries, consistency checks), 0.5–0.7 for balanced prose continuation, and 0.8–1.0 for brainstorming and highly creative generation.
help.aiStudio.providers.title: AI 提供商和密钥
help.aiStudio.ragContext.content:
Retrieval-augmented prompts (local)

When RAG context is enabled in the AI Tools panel, StoryCraft retrieves relevant manuscript chunks before calling the model. Hybrid mode blends semantic embeddings (~60%), lexical overlap (~30%), and recency (~10%).

  1. Build the index under 设置 → Advanced AI → Rebuild local search index (requires the local embedding model on capable devices).
  2. Open the AI Writing Studio, enable RAG context, and run 继续, Brainstorm, or Critic.
  3. The chunk badge shows how many passages were injected; 情节板 beat suggestions use the same pipeline.

Your manuscript text stays in the browser; only the assembled prompt is sent to your chosen AI provider.
help.aiStudio.ragContext.title: AI 生成的 RAG 上下文
help.aiStudio.tools.content:
The Right Tool for the Job

Each tool in the studio serves a different purpose:

  • 继续 Writing: Perfect for writer's block. Place your cursor in the text, and the AI will write what comes next.
  • Improve Text: Highlight a sentence or paragraph, and the AI will rewrite it. Use the Style dropdown to guide the improvement (e.g., make it more 'Cinematic').
  • Change Tone: Similar to 'Improve Text,' but uses the Tone dropdown to change the mood (e.g., make it more 'Suspenseful').
  • 生成 Dialogue: Select the characters in the scene, describe the scenario, and the AI will write their conversation.
  • Brainstorm Ideas: Get a list of creative plot points for what could happen next.
  • Summarize Section: Quickly generates a synopsis of the selected manuscript section, which is useful for checking pacing or writing chapter summaries.
help.aiStudio.tools.title: 了解人工智能工具
help.analysis.consistency.content:
Consistency Checker

The Consistency Checker scans your manuscript and compares every character and world mention against their dossier details. It catches continuity errors automatically — like a character being described as left-handed in Chapter 1 but right-handed in Chapter 12, or a location appearing after it was destroyed on the timeline.

  • How to run: Navigate to Consistency Checker from the sidebar. Click Run full scan. The scan reads all manuscript sections and cross-references characters, worlds, and the scene timeline.
  • Warning types: Name mismatch (alias used inconsistently), Attribute conflict (a physical or personality trait contradicts the dossier), Timeline violation (a scene references an event before it occurs), Dead character mention (a character marked deceased appears alive in dialogue).
  • Reading a warning: Each warning shows the section title, the offending sentence, and a suggested fix. Click Jump to section to open the 手稿 editor at that exact location.
  • Ignoring warnings: Click Dismiss on a warning to suppress it if the inconsistency is intentional (e.g. an unreliable narrator). Dismissed warnings are hidden until you click Show dismissed.
  • Re-scan after edits: The checker does not update in real time. After fixing an issue, click Run full scan again to clear the resolved warning from the list.
help.analysis.consistency.title: 一致性检查器
help.analysis.crossProject.content:
Cross-Project 搜索

Find manuscript text, character names, and world details across every project stored in your browser — ideal for series writing or reusing world-building. Enable under 设置 → Experimental flags → Cross-project search.

  • What is indexed: 手稿 section titles and content, character names and descriptions, world names. Images and encrypted keys are never indexed.
  • Index updates: The index rebuilds automatically on each save (debounced). A subtle background indicator appears in the status bar during indexing.
  • Privacy: The index lives entirely in your browser's IndexedDB. Nothing is sent to any server; all search runs locally.
  • How to search: Open the Command Palette (Ctrl+K) and type your query, or open the Cross-Project 搜索 panel from the sidebar. Results show project title, section, and a short excerpt. Click a result to open that project at the matching section.
  • Reset the index: 设置 → Data → Rebuild cross-project index if results seem stale after importing a backup.
help.analysis.crossProject.title: 跨项目搜索
help.analysis.health.content:
Project Health Score

A blended indicator (0–100) that gives you a quick read on how well-developed your project is. Enable under 设置 → Experimental flags → Project health score.

  • Goal completeness (25%): Whether a word-count goal and target date are set, and how much progress you have made toward them.
  • Cast depth (25%): Average number of filled fields per character profile. Characters with only a name pull the score down; fully described cast members lift it.
  • 世界-building coverage (25%): Ratio of world and location records with descriptions and at least one linked manuscript section.
  • 手稿 consistency (25%): Inverse of open Consistency Checker warnings — fewer warnings, higher sub-score.
  • How to improve: Expand character backstories, add world details, set a goal and target date, and resolve Consistency warnings. Each action moves the dial.
  • Location: The score ring appears on the 仪表盘 when the flag is active. Hover to see the four sub-scores individually.
help.analysis.health.title: 项目健康评分
help.analysis.progress.content:
Progress Tracker

The Progress Tracker view keeps you on course with session tracking, streaks, and historical charts.

  • Session timer: Press Ctrl+Shift+S (or the play button in the progress card) to start a writing session. Stop it to record your word-count delta and session length.
  • Daily & weekly goals: Set targets under 设置 → Writing Goals. The 仪表盘 ring shows today's progress at a glance.
  • Streak: Consecutive-day writing count at the top of the Progress view. Write at least one word on any day to keep the streak alive. Days follow your local timezone.
  • Velocity chart: 30-day rolling bar chart — words written per day. Hover a bar to see the exact count and which session contributed most.
  • 12-week heatmap: A GitHub-style contribution grid for the last 84 days. Darker cells indicate higher-output days.
  • 导出 history: Click 导出 CSV in the Progress view to download your full writing history for spreadsheet analysis.
help.analysis.progress.title: 进度和可读性
help.article.selectPrompt: 选择左侧的文章进行阅读，或者向我们的AI助手寻求帮助。
help.description: 寻找答案，学习如何掌握 StoryCraft Studio，或向我们的 AI 助手寻求帮助。
help.docs.architecture.content:
应用程序架构

StoryCraft Studio 是一款离线优先的渐进式 Web 应用程序 - 具有 Google Gemini AI 集成、IndexedDB 持久性和可选 Tauri v2 桌面 shell 的 React 19 SPA。没有后台服务器； API 密钥在 UI 中输入并静态加密。

前端堆栈

  • React 19，具有并发渲染和 React.lazy()，适用于所有 14 个视图。
  • TypeScript 在严格模式下 - exactOptionalPropertyTypes、noUncheckedIndexedAccess、 noImplicitReturns。
  • Vite 8，用于开发服务器 (HMR) 和手动代码分割的生产构建。
  • Tailwind CSS 4.x，具有用于主题化设计的自定义语义标记层（--sc-* CSS 变量）。
  • Redux Toolkit 2.x，用于全局state — 功能切片，使用 redux-undo 包装项目切片（100 步历史记录）。
  • Zustand 用于不需要 Redux 开销的瞬态 UI 状态（命令面板打开、跨项目搜索、流模式）。

服务层

  • AI 服务： Vercel AI SDK 作为主要流层；用于遗留 thunk 的 geminiService.ts。 aiProviderService.ts 中的多提供商抽象支持 Gemini、OpenAI、Anthropic、Grok、Ollama、WebLLM、ONNX 和 Transformers.js。
  • 存储： services/storage/ 下的分解 IDB 层 — 用于项目数据、快照、API 密钥、Codex、资产和服务的独立模块
  • 协作： Yjs CRDT + packages/collab-transport（y-webrtc 的供应商分支，内置 E2E RTCDataChannel 加密）。
  • 分析： OPFS 中的 DuckDB-WASM 工作程序用于高级查询； RAG 矢量存储（384 维浮动嵌入）也存在于此。

代码分割策略

入门包保持精简。 Vite 手动块分开：vendor-react、vendor-redux、plot-board (canvas/SVG)、export-docx (docx/jsPDF/jszip)、collab-yjs。 DuckDB、ONNX 和 WebLLM 块被排除在 Service Worker 预缓存之外，以避免预缓存大型 WASM 模块。

Tauri Desktop Shell

可选的 Rust/Tauri v2 包装器添加了本机文件系统访问、本地主机上的 Ollama、窗口状态持久性、本机菜单栏和内置自动更新程序。 Web 应用程序和桌面应用程序共享相同的 React 代码库；运行时检测 (isTauriRuntime()) 控制 Tauri 特定路径。
help.docs.architecture.title: 应用架构
help.docs.dataModel.content:
Project Data Model

All project data lives in a single StoryProject object in the Redux store, persisted to IndexedDB (or the Tauri app data directory) via storageService. The project slice is wrapped with redux-undo, giving you 100 steps of undo/redo history in memory.

Top-Level Fields

  • id, title, description: Project identity. The ID is a UUID generated on creation and never changes.
  • manuscript: Array of StorySection objects — each with an id, title, content (plain text), order, type (chapter / part / epilogue), and optional notes.
  • characters: Array of 角色 objects — name, aliases, backstory, personality, appearance, goals, flaws, relationships, AI-generated portrait URL.
  • worlds: Array of WorldBuilding objects — name, description, geography, culture, magic/technology system, timeline events, locations, atmosphere image URL.
  • objects: Props, factions, and groups with scene and character links (behind enableObjectsGroups flag).
  • plotConnections, plotSubplots: Edges and subplot tracks for the 情节板 canvas.
  • tensionOverrides: Manual tension-curve adjustments per section.
  • outline: AI-generated outline sections (title, description, order) — the source of truth for the 大纲 Generator view.
  • projectGoals: Target word count and target date.
  • writingHistory: Array of WritingSession records (date, words written, duration) powering the Progress Tracker charts.

Persistence

On every save (debounced 2 s after the last change), the project slice is compressed with LZ-String and written to the app-data IDB object store under the key 'project'. 设置 are written separately under 'settings'. When enableIdbAtRestEncryption is on, each value is AES-256-GCM encrypted before storage.

Snapshot Format

Snapshots capture a deep clone of the project at a point in time. Auto-snapshots (up to 20, pruned FIFO) and manual snapshots (kept indefinitely) are stored in a separate scene-revisions IDB store. Each snapshot record has an id, label, createdAt, and the full project JSON as a compressed blob.
help.docs.dataModel.title: 项目数据模型
help.docs.deployment.content:
部署选项

StoryCraft Studio 是一个静态 Web 应用程序 - 每个可以提供 HTML/CSS/JS 文件的主机都可以工作。生产版本由 vite build 生成并放置在 dist/ 中。

  • Vercel（主要）： 规范的实时部署。通过vercel.json配置；每次推送到 main 都会触发自动部署。通过 pnpm run build:edge 提供边缘兼容构建。
  • Cloudflare Pages：使用 build:pages 脚本并在 wrangler.toml 中配置。通过 Cloudflare 的全球边缘网络提供服务。适合 Vercel 延迟较高地区的用户。
  • GitHub Pages：辅助静态主机；通过 CI 部署作业从 gh-pages 分支自动部署。可作为后备。
  • 自托管：运行 pnpm run build，将 dist/ 复制到任何静态文件服务器（Nginx、Caddy、S3 + CloudFront）。不需要服务器端逻辑 - 一切都在浏览器中运行。
  • Tauri 桌面版本：由 Tauri CI 工作流程在标记版本上构建。代码签名是维护者一方的。更新检查使用指向 GitHub 发布 JSON 端点的 Tauri 更新程序插件。
  • 环境变量：在构建时仅嵌入 VITE_* 前缀的变量。二进制文件中没有包含任何密钥 - 用户在 UI 中输入自己的 API 密钥。
help.docs.deployment.title: 部署选项
help.docs.duckdb.content:
DuckDB-WASM Analytics

When the DuckDB analytics feature flag is on, StoryCraft spins up a DuckDB-WASM worker that stores rich analytics data in the browser's OPFS — a persistent, sandboxed storage not cleared by normal browser cache clears.

  • What it enables: Advanced writing analytics dashboards — velocity trends beyond the 30-day chart, character mention frequency, world reference heatmaps, and the RAG vector store (384-dim float embeddings) for faster retrieval.
  • Why WASM: DuckDB runs entirely in the browser as a WebAssembly module; no data is sent to a server. Queries run at native SQL speed directly on your local data.
  • Performance note: The DuckDB worker adds ~6 MB to initial load and uses ~50–150 MB of WASM heap depending on manuscript size. On devices with less than 4 GB RAM, prefer leaving this flag off.
  • Dual-write: When active, every save writes to both IndexedDB (fast, reliable) and DuckDB (for analytics queries). The write is asynchronous and does not block the editor.
  • Lazy loading: The DuckDB listener is dynamically imported — it does not load until the flag is on and the app restarts. Cold-start performance is unaffected when the flag is off.
  • Reset: If analytics data becomes stale, go to 设置 → Data → Reset DuckDB store to drop and recreate the DuckDB tables. Your manuscript data in IndexedDB is unaffected.
help.docs.duckdb.title: DuckDB-WASM 分析
help.docs.featureFlags.content:
功能标志系统

StoryCraft Studio 在 featureFlagsSlice 中的二十一个布尔标志后面控制实验性或资源密集型功能。标志将持久保存到关键 storycraft-feature-flags 下的 localStorage，并在应用重新启动后继续存在。

  • 切换位置： 设置 → 实验标志。每个标志都有一个标题、一行描述和相关的资源提示（内存/CPU）。
  • 对应用程序的影响：标志门侧边栏导航条目、Redux 侦听器（例如 DuckDB 双写入侦听器）和延迟加载的包。禁用标志会隐藏 UI 并暂停侦听器，但不会删除其数据。
  • 当前标志（总共 21 个）：高级故事圣经、研究活页夹、编译向导、ProForge 管道、DuckDB 分析、项目运行状况评分、应用程序运行状况面板、对象和组、思维导图、角色访谈、语音支持、LoRA 适配器、插件系统、IDB 静态加密、语音 WASM、RTL 布局、自适应 AI引擎、WebNN 推理、计算着色器、WorkerBus v2、Rust 计算。
  • 重置标志：如果应用程序变得不稳定，请转至设置 → 数据 → 重置功能标志以恢复默认设置，而无需触及项目数据。
  • 安全启用顺序： 从内存较低的标志（Codex、跨项目搜索）开始，然后再启用 WASM 较多的标志（绘图板） v2，DuckDB 分析）。始终先创建快照，以防 WASM 标志在低端硬件上触发内存不足重新启动。
  • 重置标志：如果应用变得不稳定，请转至设置 → 数据 → 重置功能标志，将所有标志恢复为默认设置，而无需触及项目数据。
help.docs.featureFlags.title: 特征标志系统
help.docs.lazyLoading.content:
Lazy 加载中 & Bundle Architecture

StoryCraft Studio is engineered for a fast initial load. All 14 major views and several heavy libraries are loaded on-demand, only when first needed.

  • Views: Every view is wrapped in React.lazy() with a Suspense boundary. The view bundle downloads the first time you navigate to it; subsequent visits use the browser cache.
  • Vite manual chunks: The build splits vendor code into named chunks: vendor-react, vendor-redux, plot-board (canvas + SVG), export-docx (docx/jsPDF/jszip), collab-yjs (Yjs + y-webrtc). These download only when you first open their respective view.
  • AI provider layer: services/ai/index.ts is dynamically imported the first time an AI tool is used. The Vercel AI SDK and provider adapters (~200 KB gzipped) are not bundled in the entry chunk.
  • DuckDB & RAG: The DuckDB listener and local embedding model are loaded by the Redux listener middleware only when their feature flags are on. They do not contribute to cold-start bundle size.
  • Force graph: react-force-graph-2d is lazy-imported only when you navigate to the 角色 Graph and have at least one character — the empty-state view loads without triggering the import.
  • Bundle budget: The CI bundle:budget job enforces a maximum of 7 000 KB for the vendor chunk and 4 500 KB for the entry chunk. PRs that exceed these limits fail the build.
help.docs.lazyLoading.title: 延迟加载和捆绑
help.docs.privacySecurity.content:
隐私和安全模型

StoryCraft Studio 的设计以本地优先为原则：除非您明确向云 AI 提供商发送提示，否则您的故事永远不会离开您的设备。

  • 无需帐户：无需注册，无需云同步，也无需存储您的手稿的服务器。所有数据都存储在浏览器的 IndexedDB 和 OPFS 中。
  • API 密钥加密：当您输入 API 密钥时，系统会使用 AES-256-GCM（256 位密钥、随机 12 字节 IV、具有 600,000 次 SHA-256 迭代的 PBKDF2）对其进行加密，然后再存储在 IndexedDB 中。明文密钥永远不会写入磁盘或本地存储。
  • AI 请求：仅将您明确提交的文本（例如“改进文本”的选定段落）发送给您选择的提供商。 RAG管道在本地运行；只有最终组装的提示符会通过网络传输。
  • 内容安全策略： Web 构建包括严格的 CSP，可阻止内联脚本、任意网络请求和本地主机连接（防止受损的扩展通过页面访问 Ollama）。
  • Tauri 桌面： Rust shell 限制对应用程序数据目录的插件权限。任意文件系统访问被阻止； dialog 插件要求用户确认每次打开/保存操作。
  • 协作：启用协作后，Yjs 更新在离开浏览器之前会进行端到端加密 (AES-256-GCM + PBKDF2)。信令服务器永远看不到纯文本文档内容。
  • 依赖性审核： OSV + CodeQL 扫描在每次 CI 推送上运行。 Dependabot 关注新的 CVE；当上游尚未提供修补版本时，将使用 pnpm.overrides 中的覆盖引脚。
help.docs.privacySecurity.title: 隐私和安全模型
help.docs.pwaDesktop.content:
PWA & Desktop Packaging

StoryCraft Studio ships as both a Progressive Web App (PWA) and a native desktop app (Tauri). Both options keep your data local — no account required.

PWA (browser)

  • Install: Visit the web app in Chrome, Edge, or Safari and click the "Install" prompt in the address bar. The app icon appears on your desktop or home screen.
  • Offline shell cache: The Service Worker pre-caches the app shell (HTML, CSS, JS entry chunks) so the interface loads instantly, even offline. Only cloud AI requests need a network connection.
  • Storage: Data lives in IndexedDB and OPFS — persistent, sandboxed, and not cleared by normal browser cache clears.
  • Icons: The PWA manifest includes 192×192 and 512×512 maskable PNG icons used by Android and Windows for the installed app shortcut.

Tauri desktop app

  • What it adds: Native filesystem access, Ollama on localhost, window-state persistence (size, position), a File/帮助 menu bar, and an optional auto-updater banner under 设置 → About.
  • Rust plugins bundled: fs, dialog, http, shell, updater, plus optional menu, tray, and window-state.
  • Data folder: On the desktop app, 设置 → Data → Open data folder reveals the OS path where all IndexedDB and OPFS data is stored — safe to back up manually.
  • Installers: Built by the Tauri CI workflow on tagged releases. Available for macOS (.dmg), Windows (.msi), and Linux (.AppImage / .deb).
help.docs.pwaDesktop.title: PWA 和桌面打包
help.docs.ragPipeline.content:
RAG & Prompt Assembly

StoryCraft's retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline enriches every AI request with relevant passages from your own manuscript — so the model knows your story before it writes the next line.

  • Building the index: Go to 设置 → Advanced AI → Rebuild local search index. StoryCraft splits your manuscript into overlapping ~200-token chunks and encodes each with MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dimensional embeddings) running locally via Transformers.js.
  • Hybrid retrieval: When a request is made, the pipeline scores candidate chunks three ways — semantic cosine similarity (~60%), lexical keyword overlap (~30%), and recency (favoring later chapters, ~10%) — then selects the top-K passages.
  • Prompt assembly: assembleRAGPrompt() builds a token-budgeted context block from the selected chunks and prepends it to the AI prompt. The chunk badge in the Writer panel shows how many passages were injected.
  • Where RAG is used: 继续 Writing, Brainstorm, AI Critic, and 情节板 "Suggest next beat" all use the same pipeline when RAG is enabled.
  • Rebuild triggers: Rebuild the index after importing a backup, adding many new characters, or when AI completions seem unfamiliar with your story's details.
  • Privacy: The index lives entirely in your browser's OPFS. 手稿 text is never uploaded to build the index — only the final assembled prompt travels to your chosen cloud provider.
help.docs.ragPipeline.title: RAG 和快速组装
help.docs.tauriDesktop.content:
Tauri Desktop App

The StoryCraft Studio desktop app wraps the same React codebase in a native Tauri v2 shell (Rust). It adds capabilities that browsers cannot provide while keeping your data fully local.

What the Desktop App Adds

  • Native filesystem access: Read and write files directly via the Tauri fs plugin — no browser file picker required for every operation. Logs are written to $APPDATA/logs/storycraft-YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl.
  • Ollama on localhost: Cloud AI providers block localhost connections in the browser (CSP); the desktop app bypasses this restriction, letting Ollama serve models at localhost:11434 without a proxy.
  • Window-state persistence: Window size, position, and maximized state are restored exactly on each launch via the Tauri window-state plugin.
  • Native menu bar: A File / 编辑 / View / 帮助 menu bar following OS conventions (macOS: menu in toolbar; Windows/Linux: embedded in the window).
  • Auto-updater: The Tauri updater plugin checks the GitHub releases JSON endpoint on startup and shows a banner under 设置 → About when a new version is available. Click Install update to download and apply it in the background.
  • Open data folder: 设置 → Data → Open data folder opens the OS file explorer at the directory where IndexedDB and OPFS data are stored — useful for manual backups.
  • Stronghold (optional): The tauri-plugin-stronghold can store the IDB encryption passphrase in the OS keychain so the unlock modal never appears on desktop.

Installers & Distribution

The Tauri CI workflow builds platform-specific installers on every tagged release (v*): .dmg for macOS (code-signed), .msi / .exe for Windows (code-signed), .AppImage and .deb for Linux. Installers are attached to GitHub Releases and referenced by the auto-updater endpoint.

Data Location

On desktop, data lives in the Tauri app data directory — typically %APPDATA%\StoryCraft Studio on Windows, ~/Library/Application Support/StoryCraft Studio on macOS, and ~/.local/share/storycraft-studio on Linux. You can safely copy this directory for a full manual backup.
help.docs.tauriDesktop.title: Tauri 桌面应用程序
help.faq.api.content:
我需要 API 密钥吗？

仅适用于云 AI 提供商。您可以使用 StoryCraft 进行所有写作、绘图板、角色、版本控制和导出，无需任何 API 密钥。本地提供商的 AI 功能也不需要密钥。

云提供商（需要 API 密钥）

  • Google Gemini（推荐 - 提供免费套餐）：从 Google AI Studio 获取免费密钥。在设置 → AI 模型 → Gemini API 密钥下输入。推荐型号：适合日常使用的 gemini-2.5-flash，适合复杂任务的 gemini-2.5-pro。
  • OpenAI： GPT-4o 和 GPT-4o-mini。从 platform.openai.com 获取密钥。在设置 → AI 模型 → OpenAI 密钥下输入。擅长遵循指令和散文重写。
  • 人类（克劳德）：克劳德3.5十四行诗和克劳德3俳句。从 console.anthropic.com 获取密钥。在设置 → AI 模型 → Anthropic key 下输入。非常适合长篇叙事和细致入微的语气。
  • Grok (xAI)： Grok-2。从 xAI 开发者门户获取密钥。在设置 → AI 模型 → xAI 密钥下输入。在创意任务上具有竞争力，每个令牌的成本低于 GPT-4。

本地提供商（无需 API 密钥）

  • WebLLM（浏览器、GPU）：通过 WebGPU 直接在浏览器中运行量化的 LLM（Llama 3.2、Phi-3.5 Mini、Gemma 2）。在设置 → 高级 AI → 本地 AI 模型下下载模型。下载后，推理可以零成本完全离线运行。
  • ONNX 运行时 Web（浏览器、CPU）：基于 WASM 的推理，无需 GPU。适用于任何设备；比 WebLLM 慢，但适合短期完成和分类任务。
  • Transformers.js：在后台自动运行本地 RAG 嵌入模型。无需配置 - 它在启用 RAG 上下文时启动。
  • Ollama（仅限桌面应用程序）：连接到位于 localhost:11434 的本地运行的 Ollama 服务器。需要 Tauri 桌面应用程序。运行 ollama pull llama3.2 即可开始。零 API 成本，完全私有，支持任何 Ollama 兼容模型，包括 LoRA 适配器。

密钥安全

每个 API 密钥在存储到 IndexedDB 之前都使用 AES-256-GCM（PBKDF2，600,000 SHA-256 迭代）加密。明文密钥永远不会写入磁盘，永远不会存储在 localStorage 中，也永远不会发送到任何 StoryCraft 服务器。您可以同时存储多个提供商的密钥并在它们之间切换，而无需重新输入它们。
help.faq.api.title: 我需要 API 密钥吗？
help.faq.offline.content:
Working Offline

StoryCraft Studio is local-first. Almost everything works without an internet connection once the app is loaded.

  • Always available offline: Writing, the 情节板, character and world editing, snapshot creation and restore, 导出 to PDF / Markdown / TXT, all 设置.
  • Needs network: Cloud AI providers (Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Grok) send your prompt over the internet. Writing is never blocked — only AI features return an error when offline.
  • Pre-download local models: Go to 设置 → Advanced AI → Local AI models and download a WebLLM or ONNX model while online. Once cached, inference runs fully offline.
  • PWA shell cache: Install StoryCraft as a PWA (browser "Install" prompt) to cache the app shell via the Service Worker. Subsequent loads work offline even without internet.
  • OPFS storage: DuckDB analytics and the local embedding model use the browser Origin Private File System (OPFS) — a persistent, sandboxed area not cleared by normal cache-clearing actions.
help.faq.offline.title: 我可以离线工作吗？
help.faq.privacy.content:
您的故事保留在您的设备上

是的，完全如此。 StoryCraft Studio 在设计上是本地优先的 — 没有 StoryCraft 帐户，没有云服务器，也没有公司可以访问您的手稿。所有数据都存储在浏览器的 IndexedDB 和 OPFS 中，这些存储只有您的设备可以读取。

什么内容保留在本地（默认情况下为所有内容）

  • 手稿、人物和世界构建 - 永远不会传输到任何地方，除非您明确将特定段落发送给 AI 提供商进行处理。
  • API 密钥 - 使用 AES-256-GCM 进行静态加密（PBKDF2，600,000 次 SHA-256 迭代）在保存到 IndexedDB 之前。明文密钥永远不会写入磁盘，永远不会存储在 localStorage 中，也永远不会发送到任何 StoryCraft 服务器。
  • 快照和备份 — 完全存储在浏览器的 IndexedDB 中。导出的 JSON 文件会直接进入您设备的下载文件夹。
  • RAG 索引和 DuckDB 分析 - 手稿块、矢量嵌入和分析数据都位于浏览器的 OPFS 中。只有最终组合的提示，而不是原始索引，才会发送给提供商。

离开您的设备的内容（仅当您选择时）

  • Cloud AI 请求：当您使用 Gemini、OpenAI、Anthropic 或 Grok 时，只有您为该特定操作明确提交的文本才会发送给提供商。 StoryCraft 不会向这些请求添加任何隐藏的遥测技术。
  • AI 提供商数据政策：每个提供商都有自己的数据保留条款。默认情况下，Google Gemini API 请求不用于训练 Google 模型。检查您选择的提供商的开发者条款以了解当前政策。
  • 协作（仅限选择加入）：如果您启用 P2P 协作，则 Yjs 文档更新在离开浏览器之前会进行端到端加密 (AES-256-GCM + PBKDF2)。信令服务器协调连接，但永远不会看到您的稿件内容。

完全离线

切换到本地 AI 提供商 - 浏览器中的 WebLLM 或桌面应用程序上的 Ollama - 或完全禁用 AI 功能。在完全离线模式下，任何地方都可以传输零数据。写入、版本控制、导出和所有设置都无需任何网络连接即可工作。
help.faq.privacy.title: 我的故事是私人的吗？
help.faq.providers.content:
Which AI Provider Should I Use?

StoryCraft supports multiple AI providers. Here is a quick guide to help you choose.

  • Google Gemini (cloud): The default. Gemini Flash is fast and free-tier friendly; Gemini Pro gives higher quality. Requires a free API key from Google AI Studio. Best for: everyday writing assistance.
  • OpenAI (cloud): GPT-4o and GPT-4o-mini via API key. Strong instruction-following and prose rewriting. Best for: users already on the OpenAI ecosystem.
  • Ollama (local — desktop only): Runs models on your machine via localhost:11434. Requires the Tauri desktop app. Best for: maximum privacy and zero API cost with any Ollama-supported model.
  • WebLLM (local — browser): GPU inference directly in the browser; no server, no API key. Models are downloaded once and cached. Best for: privacy without the desktop app, fully offline after first download.
  • Hybrid fallback: Enable under 设置 → Advanced AI to chain providers automatically — e.g., try Gemini first, fall back to Ollama on error. Useful for resilient workflows.
help.faq.providers.title: 我应该使用哪个人工智能提供商？
help.faq.saving.content:
Your entire project, including all text and AI-generated images, is saved automatically and continuously in your web browser's local storage (a database called IndexedDB). This means your work is persisted on your computer between sessions. A 'Saving...' indicator appears in the header when changes are being written, followed by 'All changes saved'.

There is no cloud account or server-side storage. This ensures complete privacy but also means you are responsible for creating backups using the '导出 Backup' feature in 设置.
help.faq.saving.title: 我的项目数据如何保存？
help.gettingStarted.desktop.content:
在何处运行 StoryCraft Studio

StoryCraft Studio 在三种环境中运行。无论您使用哪种设备，您的手稿、角色和设置始终保留在您的设备上 - 选择最适合您工作流程的选项。

浏览器（无需安装）

在任何现代浏览器（Chrome、Edge、Firefox、Safari）中打开 StoryCraft。数据存储在浏览器的 IndexedDB 中 - 一个持久的沙盒数据库，不会被正常的浏览器缓存清除所清除。一旦应用程序外壳被缓存，就可以完全离线编写、编辑、导出和管理版本。

  • 适用于任何设备 - 台式机、笔记本电脑、平板电脑和手机。
  • 始终保持最新 - Service Worker 在后台获取更新；当新版本准备就绪时，会出现通知。
  • 离线功能 - 写作、绘图板、角色、版本控制以及在没有互联网的情况下导出所有作品。只有云 AI 提供商（Gemini、OpenAI 等）需要连接。

PWA（从浏览器安装）

将 StoryCraft 作为渐进式 Web 应用程序安装在没有浏览器镶边的专用窗口中。在 Chrome 或 Edge 中，单击地址栏中的 ⊕ 图标，或转到设置 → 常规 → 作为应用安装。在 iPhone 或 iPad 上，使用“共享”→“添加到主屏幕”。

  • 在自己的窗口中打开 - 浏览器选项卡或地址栏不可见。
  • 与浏览器选项卡具有相同的功能和相同的 IndexedDB 数据。
  • Service Worker 缓存的离线 shell - 即使没有互联网也可立即打开。
  • 安装状态显示在“设置”→“常规”中，并带有绿色复选标记。

桌面应用(Tauri)

可选的 Tauri v2 桌面应用程序将 StoryCraft 封装在本机 Rust shell 中，并添加了浏览器无法提供的功能。

  • 本机文件系统访问 - 直接读写文件，无需为每个操作使用文件选择器。
  • 本地主机上的 Ollama - 浏览器 CSP 阻止本地主机连接；桌面应用程序没有。在 localhost:11434 连接本地运行的 Ollama 服务器，以实现完全私密、零成本的离线 AI 推理。
  • 窗口状态持久性 - 每次启动时都会准确恢复大小、位置和最大化状态。
  • 自动更新程序 - 设置→关于中的横幅会在有新版本可用时提醒您并将其安装在背景。
  • 打开数据文件夹 — 设置→数据→打开数据文件夹显示存储数据的确切操作系统路径，这对于手动备份很有用。
  • 安装程序 — .dmg (macOS)、.msi (Windows)、.AppImage / .deb (Linux)，可通过 GitHub 版本获取。

所有环境中的隐私

API密钥在存储之前使用 AES-256-GCM 进行加密，并且绝不会传输到任何 StoryCraft 服务器。仅当您明确将特定段落发送给云 AI 提供商时，手稿才会离开您的设备。
help.gettingStarted.desktop.title: 桌面应用程序 (Tauri) 和 PWA
help.gettingStarted.firstProject.content:
Choose Your Path

The 欢迎 Portal gives you three powerful ways to begin:

  1. Start with a Template: This is great for structured storytelling. Go to the Templates view, choose a structure like the 'Three-Act Structure,' and use the 'Personalize with AI' feature to get custom prompts for each section based on your story idea.
  2. 生成 with AI: If you have a concept but no structure, use the 大纲 Generator. Just provide your genre and a story idea, and it will create a full, editable plot outline that you can apply to your manuscript.
  3. Start Blank: For those who prefer a completely open canvas, this option creates a new project with an empty first chapter, ready for you to start writing immediately.
help.gettingStarted.firstProject.title: 开始你的第一个项目
help.gettingStarted.navigation.content:
Every major view

  • 仪表盘 — goals, stats, backup quick actions, onboarding tour.
  • 手稿 — three-panel editor with @mentions and #world tags.
  • AI Writing Studio — continue, improve, dialogue, RAG context.
  • 场景板 / 情节板 — canvas, swimlanes, tension curve, AI beat suggestions.
  • Characters, Worlds, Objects, Mind Maps, Interviews — worldbuilding suite (some behind feature flags).
  • 角色 Graph, Consistency Checker, Critic — analysis tools.
  • 导出, 设置, 帮助 — publishing, configuration, learning center.
help.gettingStarted.navigation.title: 侧边栏和视图概述
help.gettingStarted.palette.content:
Fast navigation

Press Ctrl+K (Windows/Linux) or Cmd+K (macOS) to open the command palette. 搜索 views, AI actions, theme toggles, and pinned favorites. Right-click a command to pin it.

Customize chords under 设置 → Shortcuts. Conflicts are highlighted in amber.
help.gettingStarted.palette.title: 命令面板和快捷键
help.gettingStarted.tour.content:
欢迎 to StoryCraft Studio!

The main navigation is on the left sidebar, giving you access to all core tools:

  • 仪表盘: Your project's home base. Track stats, set goals, and see your project at a glance.
  • 手稿: A focused, three-panel view for writing and organizing your chapters.
  • AI Writing Studio: Your creative partner for generating text, improving prose, and overcoming writer's block.
  • Templates: Jumpstart your story with pre-built narrative structures.
  • 大纲 Generator: Brainstorm a complete plot from a simple idea using AI.
  • Characters & 世界 Building: 创建 and manage your story's assets with rich details and AI-generated art.
  • 导出: Prepare your finished work for sharing in various formats.
  • 设置: Customize your workspace and manage your project data.
help.gettingStarted.tour.title: 界面快速浏览
help.management.backupDashboard.content:
仪表盘 Backup Quick Actions

The Backup card on the 仪表盘 gives you one-click access to the most common data-safety actions without navigating away from your project overview.

  • 导出 JSON: Click 导出 backup to download a complete JSON snapshot of your entire project — all manuscript text, characters, worlds, settings, and scene board layout. Use this to move the project to another device or as a manual archive.
  • Import backup: Click Import backup to load a previously exported JSON file. This replaces the current project, so a confirmation dialog appears first.
  • Latest snapshot: The card shows the name and timestamp of the most recent auto-snapshot. Click it to open the Version Control panel where you can compare, restore, or label that snapshot.
  • Jump to full settings: The 设置 → link at the bottom of the card takes you directly to 设置 → Backup & Data for advanced options: auto-snapshot interval, encryption passphrase, encrypted library ZIP export, and cross-project index rebuild.
  • Snapshot count: A small badge shows how many snapshots exist. Auto-snapshots beyond the limit of 20 are pruned oldest-first; manual snapshots are never pruned automatically.
help.management.backupDashboard.title: 仪表盘 backup quick actions
help.management.collaboration.content:
Collaboration (Experimental)

Real-time collaborative editing via Yjs and y-webrtc. Multiple writers can edit the same manuscript simultaneously with automatic conflict resolution. Enable the feature flag, then configure under 设置 → Collaboration.

  • Signaling server: Enter a WebRTC signaling URL in 设置 → Collaboration. Use the public wss://signaling.yjs.dev for testing, or host your own server.
  • Room ID: Share the room ID with co-authors. All writers in the same room ID connect automatically. The room is identified by a SHA-256 hash of the project and room name.
  • E2E encryption: Set a room password to enable end-to-end encryption. All Yjs updates are encrypted before leaving the browser. The green lock badge in the panel confirms encryption is active.
  • Cursor positions: Other writers' cursors appear as coloured carets in the 手稿 editor in real time.
  • Limitations: Sessions are peer-to-peer — no central server holds the document. Offline sync (merge later) is not yet supported. If all peers disconnect, the session ends.
help.management.collaboration.title: 合作（实验）
help.management.data.content:
Your Data, Your Control

You can manage your project data in 设置 > Data & Backups. StoryCraft Studio gives you full control:

  • 导出 Backup: This saves a complete JSON backup file of your entire project (including all text and settings) to your computer. Use this to move your project to another device.
  • Import Backup: Load a project from a JSON backup file.
  • Reset Project: This will permanently delete all your data in the browser and start a new, blank project.
  • Project Snapshots: This powerful feature is your safety net. The app automatically takes snapshots of your project periodically. You can also create a named snapshot manually before making major changes. You can restore your project to any snapshot at any time.
help.management.data.title: 数据管理和备份
help.management.export.content:
从草稿到文档

导出视图是一个完整的发布套件。当您配置选项时，格式化文档的实时预览会在右侧更新。在“导出控制”面板中，您可以：

  • 选择内容：选择项目中要包含的部分 - 各个章节、完整手稿、角色档案、世界构建笔记或绘图板大纲。
  • 选择格式：Markdown (.md)用于可移植性和版本控制，纯文本 (.txt)用于最大程度地提高性能。兼容性，PDF (.pdf) 用于精美的排版输出，Word 文档 (.docx) 用于在 Microsoft Word 或 LibreOffice 中编辑。
  • 自定义 PDF： 设置字体系列、字体大小和行距。启用包含项目标题、作者姓名和生成日期的专业标题页。 PDF 输出与图书预览布局紧密匹配。
  • 自定义 DOCX：Word 导出使用正确的标题样式、章节分隔符和段落格式，因此文档无需重新格式化即可立即编辑。
  • 使用 AI 增强功能：选中生成 AI 摘要，让 AI 为您的稿件编写专业的一页摘要，包含在导出的前面。需要配置 AI 提供程序。
  • 复制到剪贴板：预览面板中的复制按钮可将完整的导出文本复制到剪贴板 - 方便粘贴到 Google 文档或任何其他编辑器中。
help.management.export.title: 导出您的作品
help.management.versionControl.content:
Version Control Panel

The Version Control panel (header icon or Ctrl+Shift+V) lets you manage project snapshots like lightweight commits — no branch merging, no remote server.

  • Auto-snapshots: Created every 30 minutes of active editing. Up to 20 auto-snapshots are kept; older ones are pruned automatically (FIFO).
  • Manual snapshots: Click 创建 snapshot, enter a descriptive name (e.g., "Before Act 2 rewrite"), and confirm. Manual snapshots are never pruned automatically.
  • Diff view: Select any snapshot and click View diff to see a word-level diff against the current manuscript. Added text is green; removed text is red. Only changed sections are shown.
  • Restore: Click Restore on any snapshot to rewind to that point. A confirmation dialog lists what will change; a safety auto-snapshot of the current state is created first.
  • Branches: Click New branch to fork the current snapshot into an independent experimental branch. Switch branches from the panel header dropdown.
help.management.versionControl.title: 版本控制面板
help.noResults: 未找到“{{query}}”的结果。尝试另一个搜索。
help.proTips.featureFlags.content:
Feature Flag Rollout Strategy

Feature flags let you try powerful experimental features without committing permanently. Here is a safe rollout workflow.

  1. 创建 a snapshot first: Before enabling any flag, go to 设置 → Backup → 创建 snapshot and give it a descriptive name. If a flag causes instability, you have a safe restoration point.
  2. Enable one at a time: Toggle a single flag, use the feature for at least one writing session, then enable the next. This makes it easy to pinpoint which flag caused unexpected behavior.
  3. Low-memory flags first: Codex auto-tracking, Cross-project search, and 角色 interviews add minimal overhead. Enable these freely on any device.
  4. WASM-heavy flags on capable hardware: 情节板 v2 adds canvas rendering; DuckDB analytics loads a ~6 MB WASM module using ~50–150 MB heap. On devices with less than 4 GB RAM, enable these one at a time and monitor 设置 → Performance for memory pressure.
  5. Combining flags: 情节板 v2 + DuckDB analytics together increase WASM memory significantly. If you combine them, enable the Performance → Low-memory mode toggle to reduce DuckDB's buffer pool and 情节板's render resolution.
  6. Resetting flags: If the app becomes sluggish, go to 设置 → Data → Reset feature flags to turn all flags off without deleting project data. Then re-enable flags one by one.
help.proTips.featureFlags.title: 功能标志推出策略
help.proTips.mentions.content:
创建 a Living Document

The @mention system in the 手稿 Editor is more than just a visual aid; it's a way to create a deeply interconnected story bible. By consistently tagging characters with @ and worlds with #, you create a visual map of how your story elements interact within the narrative. This makes it easy to see which characters are active in a scene or where your story is set at a glance. It's a simple habit that pays huge dividends during editing and revision.
help.proTips.mentions.title: 有效使用@提及
help.proTips.snapshots.content:
Write Without Fear

The Snapshot system is your best friend during heavy revisions. Here's a pro workflow:

  1. Before starting a major rewrite of a chapter, go to 设置 > Data & Backups.
  2. Click '创建 Snapshot' and give it a descriptive name, like 'Pre-Act 2 Rewrite'.
  3. Now, write and revise freely, knowing you can always return to that safe version.
  4. The app also creates automatic snapshots every 30 minutes of activity, so you're always covered. You can restore from any automatic or manual snapshot if you change your mind about a direction your story has taken.
help.proTips.snapshots.title: 安全写作的快照策略
help.proTips.workflow.content:
Recommended Writing Workflow

This five-step process makes the most of every feature in StoryCraft Studio.

  1. Plan (大纲 or Template): Start in the 大纲 Generator with your genre and concept, or pick a story template. Use AI personalisation to populate chapter prompts, then apply to the manuscript.
  2. Populate (手稿): Write chapter by chapter. @mention characters and #worlds as you go to build a live cross-reference map.
  3. Draft (AI Writing Studio): Enable RAG context so AI completions draw from your actual manuscript. Use 继续 Writing for momentum; Brainstorm when stuck on what comes next.
  4. Structure (情节板): Switch to Swimlanes view for a three-act overview. Drag beat cards to rebalance pacing and review the tension curve.
  5. Deliver (导出 + Backup): Use the 导出 view for PDF or Markdown output. 创建 a manual snapshot, then export a JSON backup before sharing.

Tip: 创建 a named snapshot before every major rewrite so you can always roll back.
help.proTips.workflow.title: 推荐的写作流程
help.settingsGuide.accessibility.content:
Accessibility Hub

StoryCraft Studio is built to meet WCAG 2.2 AA. The Accessibility Hub gives you both quick presets and granular toggles so you can tune the interface to your exact needs.

Presets

Four curated profiles apply multiple settings at once — activate one as a starting point, then adjust individual toggles:

  • Motor comfort: Large text on, focus indicators on, comfortable touch targets on (minimum 44px). Ideal for users with limited fine-motor control or on touch devices.
  • Low Vision: High contrast on, large text on, focus indicators on. Increases color contrast ratios above WCAG AA minimum across all UI surfaces.
  • Cognitive Load: Reduced motion on, focus indicators on, live region verbosity set to Minimal. Reduces animation and non-essential announcements.
  • Screen Reader: Screen reader mode on, focus indicators on, live region verbosity set to Verbose. Ensures all dynamic content is announced to assistive technology.

Individual Toggles

  • High contrast: Activates a higher-contrast token set across all surfaces. Does not use the OS-level forced-colors API — the contrast mode is StoryCraft-specific so themes remain consistent.
  • Reduced motion: Disables CSS transitions, the 情节板 canvas animations, and rAF-based UI micro-animations. Respects the prefers-reduced-motion media query by default; this toggle overrides per-user preference independently of OS settings.
  • Large text: Scales body text and heading type up one step using the fluid type scale (--text-sc-* tokens). Does not affect the manuscript editor font size, which is controlled separately under 设置 → Editor.
  • Screen reader announcements: Enables a persistent ARIA live region that announces status changes (auto-save, AI progress, collaboration events). Set verbosity to Verbose for maximum coverage.
  • Focus indicators: Ensures all interactive elements show a focus-visible:ring-2 outline. Enabled by default; disable only if you rely on custom OS focus styles.
  • Comfortable touch targets: Adds extra padding around small buttons and icon controls to meet the 44×44px minimum touch target size recommended by WCAG 2.5.5.
  • Color-blind mode: Applies one of four OpenDyslexic-inspired color shifts — Protanopia, Deuteranopia, Tritanopia, or Monochromacy. Adjusts the semantic state colors (success, warning, error, info) to remain distinguishable in each mode.
help.settingsGuide.accessibility.title: 无障碍中心
help.settingsGuide.ai.content:
AI & Advanced AI 设置

Configure everything about how StoryCraft Studio generates content — from which provider handles requests to how local retrieval is assembled.

  • Default provider & model: Choose between Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Grok, Ollama, WebLLM, ONNX, or Transformers.js. The selected provider is used for all AI Writing Studio tools unless overridden per-session.
  • Creativity (temperature): Slide from 0 (deterministic, precise) to 1 (highly creative, unpredictable). For brainstorming use 0.8–1.0; for factual summaries use 0.2–0.4.
  • Hybrid fallback chain: Define an ordered list of providers. If the primary provider returns an error, StoryCraft retries with the next in the chain. Useful for resilient setups.
  • RAG index mode: Hybrid blends semantic embeddings (MiniLM-L6-v2, 384 dimensions) with lexical overlap and recency weighting. Lexical is faster and works on devices without a capable GPU.
  • Rebuild local search index: Rebuilds the in-browser embedding index from scratch. Do this after importing a backup or after adding many new characters and world entries.
  • DuckDB analytics toggle: Enables the OPFS-backed DuckDB-WASM worker for advanced writing analytics dashboards. Adds ~6 MB to first-run WASM load — leave off on low-memory devices.
  • GPU metrics panel: Shows real-time VRAM usage and WebGPU adapter info. Useful when running WebLLM to confirm the model fits in your GPU's memory.
help.settingsGuide.ai.title: 人工智能和高级人工智能设置
help.settingsGuide.backup.content:
Backup & Data 设置

Two related settings categories: Backup for snapshot automation and encryption, and Data for exporting, importing, and resetting project data.

Backup

  • Auto-snapshot interval: Choose how often the app creates automatic snapshots — 15 min, 30 min (default), or 60 min. Auto-snapshots are kept up to a maximum of 20; older ones are pruned FIFO. Manual snapshots are never pruned.
  • Encryption passphrase: Set a passphrase to encrypt exported JSON and library ZIP files. Encrypted exports require the same passphrase to import — store it safely. Leaving this blank means exports are unencrypted JSON.

Data

  • 导出 JSON backup: Downloads a full project JSON file (optionally encrypted if a passphrase is set).
  • Import backup: Loads a previously exported JSON — encrypted or plain. Replaces the current project after confirmation.
  • 导出 encrypted library ZIP: Packages all browser projects into a single AES-256-GCM encrypted archive — useful for full device migration.
  • Reset project: Wipes all manuscripts, characters, worlds, and settings from IndexedDB. An auto-snapshot is created first for safety.
  • Open data folder (desktop): On the Tauri desktop app, opens the OS file explorer at the directory where IndexedDB and OPFS files are stored.
help.settingsGuide.backup.title: 备份与数据
help.settingsGuide.flags.content:
实验功能标志

StoryCraft Studio 为主动开发中的功能提供了21 个功能标志。标志存储在 localStorage 的 storycraft-feature-flags 中，并在应用重新启动后继续存在。在 v1.21 中，全新安装时所有标志默认为 on — RTL 布局除外，在发布完整的语言环境内容之前，RTL 布局将保持关闭状态。 在低内存设备上启用 WASM 重标志之前创建快照。

编写和结构

  • 高级故事圣经：通过关系图、时间线线程和多世界地图集导航解锁高级故事圣经视图。
  • 研究活页夹：添加专用的研究活页夹视图，用于存储外部链接、参考注释和剪报和手稿。
  • 编译向导：一个分步向导，用于从选定的部分组装最终手稿，并在一个流程中进行章节重新排序、前言和导出设置。
  • ProForge 管道：八阶段代理编辑管道 - 结构分析、行文编辑、副本编辑、校对、制作和出版。每个阶段都会暂停以供您回顾；未经明确批准，不得修改手稿。从 Writer 视图中的 AI 工具面板启动。

AI 与分析

  • DuckDB 分析：启用基于 WASM 的 DuckDB 工作器以实现高级写作分析仪表板 - 速度趋势、字符提及频率和 RAG 矢量存储（384 维嵌入）。首次运行负载增加约 6 MB；使用约 50–150 MB WASM 堆。在 RAM 小于 4 GB 的设备上不要这样做。
  • 项目运行状况评分：在仪表板上显示 0-100 混合质量指标 - 目标完整性 (25%)、铸造深度 (25%)、世界构建覆盖率 (25%) 和打开一致性检查器警告 (25%)。
  • 应用程序运行状况面板：在显示 IndexedDB 的“设置”下添加一个系统面板使用情况、OPFS 存储、内存压力、Service Worker 状态和 DuckDB Worker 运行状况 - 对于诊断低内存设备上的速度下降很有用。

Worldbuilding Suite

  • 对象和组：通过场景和角色链接跟踪道具、派系和分组实体。将对象视图添加到侧边栏。
  • 思维导图：用于探索故事元素之间关系的免费画布视觉工具。拖放节点、标记边缘、导出为 PNG。
  • 角色访谈：由人工智能驱动的结构化问答会话，用角色自己的语言揭示角色的声音和背景故事。答案可以直接应用于角色档案字段。

协作和平台

  • 语音支持：启用完整的语音命令界面 - 按键通话、唤醒词激活、直接听写到稿件编辑器以及自然语言导航命令。在“设置”→“语音和语音”下进行配置。
  • LoRA 适配器：加载到 Ollama 中的微调 LoRA 适配器的推理侧接线。在设置 → AI → Fine-Tuning 下加载 .safetensors 适配器；使用 α 比例滑块控制风格影响。训练是浏览器外部的 Python sidecar 工作流程。
  • 插件系统（测试版）：通过功能范围的 API 沙盒化第三方插件。每个插件都会声明其权限，并且除了明确请求的范围外，无法直接访问 Redux 存储、网络或文件系统。参考插件 - 字数叠加和场景附加程序 - 随应用程序一起提供。
  • RTL 布局（测试版 - ar/he）： 激活 html[dir=rtl] 和 BiDi 布局镜像。存在阿拉伯语和希伯来语语言环境存根；完整的翻译内容是 v2.0 的社区里程碑。这是 v1.21 中唯一默认为关闭的标志。

加密与安全

  • IDB 静态加密：为所有 IndexedDB 存储启用密码派生的 AES-256-GCM 加密。在设置 → 隐私和安全 → 静态加密项目数据下设置密码。每次启动时，解锁模式都会提示输入密码；该密钥是会话范围的并且永远不会写入磁盘。您的密码无法恢复 - 请先导出加密备份。
  • 语音 WASM（离线引擎）：将语音转文本引擎从浏览器的内置 Web 语音 API 切换到完全设备上的 Whisper.cpp WASM 引擎，并与 Silero VAD v4 语音活动检测器配合使用，以实现精确的语音开始检测。从设置→语音和语音→下载离线模型下载模型。音频永远不会离开您的设备。

边缘人工智能和计算（实验性）

  • 自适应人工智能引擎：在运行时检测您的硬件 - WebGPU、WebNN、DirectML、CPU 内核、VRAM 层和电池电量 - 并将本地推理路由到最快的可用后端。包括 Eco 模式（选择最小的可行模型以节省电池和内存）和选项卡领导者选举，以防止多选项卡 GPU 争用。
  • WebNN 推理：在支持时通过浏览器的 WebNN API 路由本地模型推理 — 通常比具有专用神经处理单元 (NPU) 的 CPU 上的普通 WASM 更快。在不受支持的硬件上自动回退到 WASM。
  • 计算着色器：为嵌入生成和 RAG 索引构建启用原始 WebGPU 计算着色器加速。在支持 WebGPU 的 GPU 上速度显着加快；对不支持 WebGPU 的设备没有影响。
  • WorkerBus v2：通过 WorkerBus 编排层路由所有后台 AI 任务和存储操作 — 类型化跨线程消息协议，具有版本协商、每个工作线程断路器、优先级任务队列（关键 > 高 > 正常 > 低 > 后台）以及用于无法交付任务的死信队列。
  • Rust 计算： 卸载选定的负载通过 Tauri 桌面后端对已编译的 Rust/WASM 模块进行 CPU 密集型操作（文本分析、标记化）。仅限桌面应用程序；对浏览器版本没有影响。
help.settingsGuide.flags.title: 所有 21 个功能标志
help.settingsGuide.overview.content:
设置概览

StoryCraft Studio 的设置被组织成可从左侧导航面板访问的语义组。使用“设置”顶部的搜索框按关键字直接跳转到任何类别。

设置组

  • 常规 - UI 语言、区域和 PWA 安装。在这里更改显示语言；无需重新加载即可立即生效。
  • 外观和主题 - 浅色、深色、棕褐色和特殊主题（午夜、森林、余烬、海洋、北极、幻想、浪漫）。每个都激活整个 UI 上的完整语义标记调色板。
  • 编辑器 - 字体系列（衬线、无衬线、等宽字体、阅读障碍友好）、基本字体大小、行距、段落缩进和书写焦点模式设置。
  • AI 模型 - 主要 AI 提供者和模型（Gemini、OpenAI、Anthropic、Grok、Ollama、WebLLM、ONNX、 Transformers.js）、API 密钥、创意滑块和混合后备链。
  • 高级 AI — RAG 索引模式（混合/词汇）、本地 AI 模型下载、DuckDB 分析切换、GPU 指标面板和提示自定义。
  • 辅助功能 — 用于高对比度、减少运动、大文本、屏幕阅读器公告、对焦环、舒适触摸目标的预设和精细切换，以及色盲模式。
  • 隐私和数据 - AI 请求策略（仅限本地与云）、IDB 静态加密密码、GDPR 切换、分析选择退出。
  • 性能 - 自动保存间隔、缓存预算、预加载和延迟加载首选项、低内存模式。
  • 通知 - 桌面通知、写作提醒、目标达成提醒和协作更新徽章。
  • 协作 - WebRTC 信号 URL、房间共享和 E2E 加密房间密码。
  • 集成 - LanguageTool（语法检查器）、云同步提供商和第三方导出目标。
  • 备份和快照 - 自动快照间隔（15 / 30） / 60 分钟）、手动快照创建、快照限制和备份加密密码。
  • 数据 — 导出 JSON 备份、导入备份、加密库 ZIP、重置项目、重建跨项目索引和重置 DuckDB 存储。
  • 快捷方式 — 记录或重置每个操作的键盘绑定；冲突检测以琥珀色突出显示重复的和弦。
  • 语音 - 启用语音命令、选择 STT / TTS 引擎、一键通快捷方式、云 STT 回退和听写自动标点符号。
  • 关于和更新 - 应用程序版本、Tauri 桌面自动更新程序、开源许可证和数据文件夹路径（桌面）仅）。
  • 实验标志 - 测试版功能的 21 个切换。一次启用一个；首先在低内存设备上创建快照。
help.settingsGuide.overview.title: 设置 overview
help.settingsGuide.pwaInstall.content:
Installing StoryCraft Studio

You can install StoryCraft Studio on your device for faster access, a dedicated window, and full offline use — no app store required. Go to 设置 → General and find the Install as App card.

When an Install Button appears

When you visit StoryCraft in Chrome, Edge, or Safari, the browser automatically evaluates whether the app is installable. If it is, a Install StoryCraft Studio button appears in 设置 → General. Clicking it triggers the browser's built-in install prompt.

When no button is shown

If no install button appears, install manually via the browser:

  • Chrome / Edge: Click the install icon (⊕) in the address bar, or open the browser menu (⋮) and click Install StoryCraft Studio.
  • Safari on iPhone/iPad: Tap the Share button (□↑), then tap 添加 to Home Screen.
  • Firefox: Firefox does not support PWA installation directly; use Chrome or Edge for the installed-app experience.

After Installation

The app opens in its own window without browser chrome — tabs, address bar, and toolbar are hidden. It behaves exactly like the browser version: the same data, the same features, and the same Service Worker for offline caching. The install status is shown in 设置 → General with a green checkmark.

Clearing the Cache

The Clear app cache button in 设置 → General forces the Service Worker to re-download all assets on the next reload. Use it if the UI looks stale or you want to confirm you are running the latest version. The reload happens automatically after the cache is cleared.
help.settingsGuide.pwaInstall.title: 将 StoryCraft 安装为应用程序
help.settingsGuide.shortcuts.content:
Keyboard Shortcuts 设置

The Shortcuts page lets you customize every keyboard binding in StoryCraft Studio, record new chords, and detect conflicts before they cause confusion.

  • Recording a shortcut: Click the binding field next to any action, then press the key combination you want. Single keys, Ctrl/Cmd combos, and multi-modifier chords (e.g. Ctrl+Shift+P) are all supported.
  • Conflict detection: If two actions share the same chord, both fields are highlighted in amber and a warning badge appears. The conflict must be resolved before the new binding is saved.
  • Resetting to defaults: Click Reset all shortcuts at the bottom of the page to restore built-in bindings. You can also reset individual actions by clicking the circular arrow icon next to each one.
  • Built-in defaults: Command palette Ctrl+K, save Ctrl+S, new section Ctrl+N, search Ctrl+F, export Ctrl+E, theme toggle Ctrl+Shift+T, version control panel Ctrl+Shift+V.
  • Context-sensitive bindings: Some shortcuts only fire inside a specific view (e.g. G to toggle graph/table in 角色 Graph). These are listed under their view's group on the shortcuts page.
  • Import / 导出: The 导出 shortcuts button saves your custom bindings as a JSON file; Import shortcuts applies a previously exported set — useful for syncing across devices.
help.settingsGuide.shortcuts.title: 键盘快捷键
help.title: 帮助 & Learning Center
help.worldbuilding.characters.content:
Breathing Life into Your Cast

In the Characters view, you manage your cast of characters. You can:

  • 添加 Manually: 创建 a blank character sheet to fill out yourself.
  • 生成 with AI: Provide a simple concept (e.g., 'a cynical detective who loves cats'), and the AI will generate a detailed backstory, motivation, personality, flaws, and more.
  • 生成 a Portrait: Based on the 'Appearance' field, the AI can generate a unique character portrait. You can then use the 'Refine Portrait' input to make changes (e.g., 'give him a scar over his left eye').
  • Regenerate Fields: Don't like a specific detail? Click the regenerate icon next to any field to have the AI rewrite just that part.
help.worldbuilding.characters.title: 塑造角色
help.worldbuilding.graph.content:
角色 Relationship Graph

The 角色 Graph visualizes every character you have created as a node in a force-directed network. Edges between nodes represent the relationship type you defined on each character's dossier. Use it to spot isolated characters, tangled alliances, or missing antagonist arcs at a glance.

  • Drag nodes: Click and drag any node to reposition it. The physics simulation re-settles after you release.
  • Filter by tag: Use the tag filter dropdown at the top of the view to show only characters with a specific tag, e.g. "Protagonist" or "Antagonist". Unmatched nodes fade to grey.
  • Open a dossier: Click a node to highlight its direct connections; double-click to open the full character dossier panel on the right.
  • Keyboard alternative: Press G while the 角色 Graph view is active to toggle between the graph and a screen-reader-friendly relationship table that lists the same data in rows and columns.
  • Zoom & pan: Scroll to zoom; drag the canvas background to pan. Use Ctrl+0 to fit the entire graph to the viewport.
help.worldbuilding.graph.title: 角色 relationship graph
help.worldbuilding.interviews.content:
角色 Interviews

角色 Interviews guide you through structured AI-powered Q&A sessions that reveal a character's voice, backstory, and motivation from their own perspective. Enable under 设置 → Experimental flags → 角色 interviews.

  • Start an interview: Open a character's detail page and click Start Interview. Choose an archetype (Hero, Mentor, Shadow, etc.) for a curated question set.
  • Interview flow: The AI presents one question at a time and responds in the character's voice. Your follow-up notes steer the next question.
  • Sample questions: "What do you fear most?", "Describe the moment your life changed forever.", "What would you sacrifice to achieve your goal?"
  • 保存 to profile: Click Apply to 角色 at the end. Key answers are written back to the Backstory and Motivation fields automatically.
  • Re-interview: Run multiple sessions with different archetypes to explore new dimensions of the same character.
help.worldbuilding.interviews.title: 角色 interviews
help.worldbuilding.mindmaps.content:
Mind Maps

Mind Maps give you a visual canvas for exploring relationships between characters, scenes, worlds, and objects. Enable under 设置 → Experimental flags → Mind maps.

  • Node types: 添加 character, world, scene, or free-text nodes. Each type has its own colour and icon for quick identification.
  • Links: Draw a connection from any node to another. Each link can carry a label (e.g., "allies with", "lives in"). Drag the midpoint to reroute the line.
  • Zoom & pan: Scroll to zoom; drag the canvas background to pan. Use the minimap in the lower-right corner to navigate large maps.
  • Filter: Click the filter toolbar to hide all nodes of a given type — useful for focusing on character relationships only or on location clusters.
  • 导出: The toolbar 导出 button saves the current canvas as a PNG for sharing or printing.
help.worldbuilding.mindmaps.title: 思维导图
help.worldbuilding.objects.content:
Objects & Groups Inventory

Track every significant prop, faction, and grouped entity with full scene and character links. Enable under 设置 → Experimental flags → Objects & Groups.

  • Props: Physical items that appear in scenes — weapons, artefacts, vehicles, key items. 添加 a description and link the prop to the scene where it first appears.
  • Factions: Organisations or power structures. Define goals and allegiances; characters can belong to multiple factions.
  • Groups: Custom collections spanning types — tag characters and locations under one named group to filter the inventory at a glance.
  • Scene & 角色 Links: Open any Object card and click Link to scene or Link to character. Linked entities appear as chips; click one to jump directly to the target.
  • Filter Bar: Use the type filter (Prop / Faction / Group) and the search bar at the top of the Objects view to narrow the list quickly.
help.worldbuilding.objects.title: 对象和组清单
help.worldbuilding.worlds.content:
Constructing Your Universe

The 世界 Building view is for defining your story's setting. Similar to the character builder, you can:

  • 生成 with AI: 创建 a rich world profile from a core concept (e.g., 'a steampunk city powered by captured lightning').
  • Flesh out Details: Manually define geography, culture, and magic/technology systems.
  • 创建 Timelines and Locations: Use the dedicated tabs in the world atlas to add historical events to a timeline or define key locations within your world.
  • 生成 an Ambiance Image: Let the AI create a beautiful, atmospheric image based on your world's description to set the mood.
help.worldbuilding.worlds.title: 世界 Building
help.writing.bookPreview.content:
Book Preview

Book Preview renders your entire manuscript as a continuous reading experience — the closest view to a real book before you export.

  • Opening: Click the eye icon in the 手稿 header, or use the Command Palette and search "Book Preview".
  • Live table of contents: The TOC panel on the left uses an IntersectionObserver to highlight the current chapter as you scroll. Click any chapter title to jump to it.
  • Reading controls: Adjust font size with the A− / A+ buttons in the Preview toolbar. The font family follows your Editor font preference from 设置.
  • Fullscreen: Click the Expand button (or press F11 in most browsers) to enter fullscreen reading mode. Press Escape to exit.
  • 导出 preparation: Use Book Preview as a final read-through. The layout closely matches the PDF export output, so you can catch formatting issues before committing to a file.
  • Progress bar: A thin reading-progress bar at the top tracks how far through the manuscript you have scrolled.
help.writing.bookPreview.title: 图书预览及进度
help.writing.manuscript.content:
A Distraction-Free Writing Environment

The 手稿 view is designed for focus and flow. On desktop, it features three resizable panels:

  • Navigator (Left): This panel lists all your chapters or sections. Click to jump between them or drag-and-drop to reorder your story on the fly.
  • Editor (Center): This is your main writing space. It features real-time highlighting for mentions. Use the @ key to tag characters (e.g., @Jax) and the # key to tag worlds (e.g., #Neo-Veridia) for easy reference.
  • Inspector (Right): This panel keeps your project's high-level details, like the Title and Logline, always within reach. You can even use the AI Assistant here to generate logline ideas.

On mobile devices, the Navigator and Inspector are tucked away in drawers to maximize your writing space.
help.writing.manuscript.title: The Three-Panel 手稿 Editor
help.writing.outline.content:
From Idea to Plot in Minutes

This is one of the most powerful tools for starting a story. The process is simple:

  1. Provide Your Idea: Enter a genre and your main concept.
  2. Use Advanced Options: For better results, specify key characters, setting, and desired pacing. You can even ask the AI to include a plot twist.
  3. 编辑 and Refine: The AI will produce a complete, multi-section outline. This is a fully interactive draft. You can rewrite titles and descriptions, drag sections to reorder them, regenerate individual sections, or add new ones manually.
  4. Apply to 手稿: When you're happy, click 'Apply 大纲 to 手稿'. This will create a new manuscript with each outline section as a chapter, complete with your descriptions as writing prompts.
help.writing.outline.title: Mastering the AI 大纲 Generator
help.writing.plotBoardV2.content:
Canvas Mode — Deep Dive

Canvas is the freeform mode of 情节板 v2. It is designed for visual thinkers who want to arrange story beats spatially rather than linearly.

Navigation

  • Pan: Drag the canvas background (not a card). Hold Space on desktop to temporarily switch to pan mode.
  • Zoom: Scroll the mouse wheel, pinch on touch screens, or use the + / − controls in the toolbar. Press Ctrl+0 to fit the entire board to the viewport.
  • Minimap: The minimap in the lower-right corner shows a bird's-eye view of all cards. Click inside the minimap to jump to any area of the board.

Cards and layout

  • Grid snap: Enable the grid toggle in the toolbar to snap cards to an 8px grid — keeps your board tidy when you have many beats.
  • Multi-select: Hold Shift and click multiple cards to move them as a group. Useful for repositioning a whole act.
  • Card colors: Set a card color to visually separate subplots, POV characters, or act acts. Colors persist with the card and appear in swimlane view too.

Connections

  • Drawing: Hover a card edge until the connector handle appears, then drag to another card. The SVG line curves automatically around intervening cards.
  • Labels: Click a connection line to add a label — e.g. "causes", "foreshadows", "mirrors".
  • Touch targets: Connection lines have a 44px invisible hit area so they remain tappable on phones without needing pixel-perfect aim.

AI beat suggestion

Click AI ✦ → Suggest next beat to have the AI propose a beat card using RAG context from your manuscript. The suggestion includes a title, description, and recommended act. Click Accept to create the card, or Suggest again to see another option.
help.writing.plotBoardV2.title: 情节板 v2 — canvas deep dive
help.writing.ragHybrid.content:
Hybrid RAG — Retrieval-Augmented Generation

When RAG context is enabled, StoryCraft retrieves relevant passages from your own manuscript before calling the AI model. The AI then generates with knowledge of your actual story — characters, plot developments, world details — rather than working blind from a single paragraph.

Two retrieval modes

  • Hybrid (recommended): Blends three signals — semantic cosine similarity via a 384-dimensional MiniLM-L6-v2 embedding model (~60%), lexical keyword overlap (~30%), and chapter recency (~10%). Works best for complex stories with rich character and world details.
  • Lexical only: Pure keyword matching — faster, works on any device without a local ML model, but misses semantic connections (e.g. won't retrieve a passage about "courage" when you query for "bravery").

Configuring RAG

  1. Go to 设置 → Advanced AI → Context retrieval mode and pick Hybrid or Lexical.
  2. Click Rebuild local search index to build or refresh the embedding index. Do this after importing a backup or after adding many new characters and world entries.
  3. 返回 in the AI Writing Studio, toggle Use RAG context in the Writer toolbar. The chunk badge (e.g. 4 chunks) shows how many passages were injected into the current request.

Where RAG is used

继续 Writing, Brainstorm, Summarize, AI Critic, and the 情节板 Suggest next beat feature all use the same RAG pipeline when enabled.

Privacy: The index lives in your browser's OPFS. Only the final assembled prompt (not the raw index) travels to your cloud AI provider.
help.writing.ragHybrid.title: Hybrid RAG in Writer & 情节板
help.writing.sceneboard.content:
情节板 & 场景板

The 情节板 gives you a visual overview of your story's structure. Activate it under 设置 → Experimental flags → 情节板 v2.

Three view modes

  • Canvas: A freeform board with pan/zoom, 8px grid snapping, SVG connection lines between beat cards, and a minimap for large boards. Pinch to zoom on touch screens; drag the background to pan. Connection lines have 44px touch targets on mobile.
  • Swimlanes: Organizes beat cards into three columns — Act 1, Act 2, Act 3. Drag cards across acts to rebalance your story structure. A tension curve overlay shows the narrative arc across the top.
  • Timeline: A chronological view that maps scenes and events onto a horizontal time axis — useful for stories with non-linear timelines or multiple POV threads.

Working with beat cards

  • 创建 a card: Click the + New beat button or double-click an empty area on the canvas.
  • Context actions: Long-press (touch) or right-click (desktop) a beat card to pin, delete, duplicate, or link it to a manuscript section.
  • Link to sections: Each beat card can be pinned to a manuscript section so clicking the card jumps you straight to that chapter in the editor.
  • AI suggest next beat: Open the AI ✦ panel in the toolbar. StoryCraft retrieves relevant manuscript chunks via RAG and proposes the next beat with a title, description, and act placement. Accept to create the card; click Suggest again for an alternative.
help.writing.sceneboard.title: 情节板 & 场景板
help.writing.templates.content:
建立在坚实的基础上

模板为您的故事提供了一个起始结构。在模板视图中，您可以：

  • 预览：单击任何模板以查看其部分。
  • 重新混合：应用之前，单击“重新混合此模板”。这样您就可以添加、删除、重命名和重新排序各个部分，以创建自定义结构。
  • 利用 AI 进行个性化：输入您的核心故事概念，AI 将为每个部分生成独特的、鼓舞人心的提示，以指导您的写作。
  • 应用：应用模板后，它将取代您当前的手稿和大纲，为您提供成功的清晰结构。
help.writing.templates.title: 使用模板
help.writing.writer.content:
AI Writing Studio Workflow

The AI Writing Studio is your dedicated space for AI-assisted drafting, editing, and brainstorming. The workflow is designed so AI assistance always flows through a scratchpad — you stay in control before anything touches your manuscript.

  1. Select a section: Use the section dropdown at the top of the Writer panel to pick which manuscript chapter you are working on. The editor scrolls to that section automatically.
  2. Pick a tool: Choose from 继续 Writing, Improve Text, Change Tone, 生成 Dialogue, Brainstorm, Summarize, or Critic. Each tool has a different purpose — hover any tool icon for a one-line description.
  3. Enable RAG context (optional): Toggle Use RAG context in the toolbar to have the AI draw on relevant passages from your manuscript before generating. This produces more consistent, story-aware output. The chunk badge shows how many passages were retrieved.
  4. 生成: Click the 生成 button. Progress is shown in the scratchpad; streaming output appears token by token so you can stop early if the direction is wrong.
  5. 编辑 the scratchpad: The generated text lands in the editable scratchpad below the tools. Refine it directly — fix names, change phrasing, trim length — before accepting.
  6. Insert or Replace: Click Insert at cursor to add the scratchpad text after your current cursor position, or Replace selection to swap out the highlighted text you started with.

Hybrid fallback chains (设置 → Advanced AI → Hybrid fallback) retry additional providers automatically if the primary returns a rate-limit or network error.
help.writing.writer.title: AI 写作工作室工作流程
